name: ts-review
description: Opinionated TypeScript / JavaScript code review skills. Auto-detects stack (Next.js, React, Drizzle, next-safe-action, Zod, Tailwind, Vitest, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Includes full single-agent (/ts-review), lite single-pass (/ts-review-lite, ~80 model turns), and 5-parallel-subagent (/ts-review-multi-agent) variants. Manual invocation only.
